brief.title: Founder App Idea
brief.source_text:
Founder App Idea

I want a simple web app that helps solo founders turn scattered notes into a cleaner execution plan before they hire engineers.
Keep the first release focused on one core flow: paste notes, review planning gaps, and export a compact package for review.

Goals:
- Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a compact delivery pack they can review locally

Non-Goals:
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet

Constraints:
- Budget around $20k
- Need something usable in 6 to 8 weeks
- Just me plus one contract engineer

Notes:
- I care more about clarity than breadth for the first release
- Reference example: https://example.com/founder-notes

artifacts.name: brief.md
artifacts.content:
# SpecForge Brief

Title: Founder App Idea
Product Type: web app
Audience: founders

## Summary
Founder App Idea is a web app aimed at founders. Primary goal: Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope.

## Explicit Brief Input
- Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a compact delivery pack they can review locally
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet
- Budget around $20k
- Need something usable in 6 to 8 weeks
- Just me plus one contract engineer

## Deterministic Interpretation
- Inferred product type: web app.
- Inferred platform hints: web.

## Priority Open Questions
- No unresolved questions were generated

## Notes
- I care more about clarity than breadth for the first release
- Reference example: https://example.com/founder-notes

## References
- https://example.com/founder-notes

## Source Text
```text
Founder App Idea

I want a simple web app that helps solo founders turn scattered notes into a cleaner execution plan before they hire engineers.
Keep the first release focused on one core flow: paste notes, review planning gaps, and export a compact package for review.

Goals:
- Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a compact delivery pack they can review locally

Non-Goals:
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet

Constraints:
- Budget around $20k
- Need something usable in 6 to 8 weeks
- Just me plus one contract engineer

Notes:
- I care more about clarity than breadth for the first release
- Reference example: https://example.com/founder-notes
```

artifacts.content:
# SpecForge Scope

## Goals
- Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope
- Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers
- Produce a compact delivery pack they can review locally
- Need something usable in 6 to 8 weeks

## Non-Goals
- No cloud sync
- Don't build team collaboration yet

## Scope Draft
- Shape the first scoped draft around a web app.
- Prioritize the needs of founders.
- Support goal: Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope.
- Support goal: Highlight missing constraints before they hire engineers.
- Support goal: Produce a compact delivery pack they can review locally.
- Keep out of scope for now: No cloud sync.
- Keep out of scope for now: Don't build team collaboration yet.
- Respect platform hints: web.

## First Step Recommendation
Anchor the first release on this primary goal: Help founders turn rough product ideas into a reviewable scope
